posts.title: The Bug Bounty That Quit
posts.description: A company retired its bug bounty program this month. The reason is the new shape of the work, and it’s worth a look.

posts.title: The Digital Doppelgängers Rises
posts.description: We are generating our replacements at scale. The question is whether we can tell them apart from ourselves.

posts.title: The Lonely Crowd, Cloud Edition
posts.description: The AI companion market is at $7B and growing. The users are getting lonelier. Both things are true.

posts.title: You Are Not Paying for AI. You Are Paying for the Subsidy.
posts.h1: You Are Not Paying for AI. You Are Paying for the Subsidy.
posts.description: A Medium post made the rounds this week arguing the obvious. Why it’s worth saying anyway.
